+------------------------------------+
|                                    |
+--+-------+---------------+         |
|  |  Out  |               |         |
|  +-------+               |         |
|      ^                   |         |
+------o---------+         |         |
|      |         |         |         |
|      |         |         |         |
| +----+---+     |         |         |
| |  Node  |     |         |         |
| +--------+     |         |         |
|      ^     |   |         |         |
|      |     |   |         |         |
+[  Deep  ]--o---+         |         |
|            ++            |         |
|             |            |         |
|             |            |         |
+[  Inner  ]--o------------+         |
|             |                      |
|             |                      |
|             |                      |
|             |                      |
|             |                      |
+[  Outer  ]--o----------------------+
       +--+---+
   +---+--+
   |  In  |
   +------+
